title: Contact - Rushanara Ali MP - Bethnal Green and Stepney
text_excerpt: Contact - Rushanara Ali MP - Bethnal Green and Stepney Skip to main content Rushanara Ali MP - Bethnal Green and Stepney Join Get Involved Donate About Contact Latest News More Menu Contact I want to hear about the issues that are important to you. If you are my constituent and you have an issue you would like help with, please get in touch by emailing me at rushanara@rushanaraali.org or giving my office a call on 0207 219 7200 or providing your name, address, telephone number and details about your case. Surgeries : I hold regular advice surgeries in Bethnal Green and Stepney by appointment only. If you require an appointment, please mention this in your email. For diary or any other enquiries , please email rushanara.ali.mp@parliament.uk Follow on social media Rushanara Ali MP - Bethnal Green and Stepney Further details Promoted by Graham Taylor on behalf of Rushanara Ali. Both at 349 Cambridge Heath Road, London E2 9RA. ©2026 ©2025 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
